_testCase.name: min_evidence_refs
_testCase.description: Only 1 source for 29 fields requiring 2+ evidence refs (actuation_adjustment_step, adjustable_actuation_max, adjustable_actuation_min, adjustable_input_granularity, analog_input, anti_ghosting, bottom_out_force, connection, debounce_time, depth, form_factor, key_count, key_rollover, keycap_thickness, layout_standard, multi_key_latency, polling_rate_wired, polling_rate_wireless, rapid_trigger, scan_rate, single_key_latency, socd_cleaning, sound_dampening, sound_profile, switch_name, switch_type, typing_noise, weight, width)
